title: John Hardy
compiled_truth: John Hardy is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-16 to 2002-03-06), John Hardy sent 19 and received 188 emails, totalling 207 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rob Walls](people/rob-walls) (8), [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (7), [A  Hughes](people/a-hughes) (7), [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (7), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (7). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_budget, deleted_items, inbox, india, venezuela_colombia.
